reason: commercial_invoice is required but not completed

task.title: Missing commercial invoice
task.description: The commercial invoice is required for customs valuation but has not been provided. Obtain it from the importer before the review deadline.

reason: packing_list is required but not completed

task.title: Missing packing list
task.description: The packing list is required to verify the shipment contents but has not been provided. Request it from the shipper.

reason: transport_document is required but not completed

task.title: Missing transport document
task.description: The transport document (Bill of Lading / AWB) is required to take delivery but has not been provided. Contact the freight partner to obtain it.

task.title: Wood packaging not ISPM-15 certified
task.description: The shipment uses solid-wood packaging that requires ISPM-15 treatment certification to clear phytosanitary inspection. Obtain the fumigation certificate.

task.title: High-value shipment requires manager review
task.description: The invoice value exceeds the manager-review threshold. A manager must review and approve this high-value shipment before clearance.
task.suggestedAction: Manager to review and approve high-value shipment
